title: Cinematic Vertical Shot Small Crew Fishing Boat
sourceTitle: Cinematic Vertical Shot Small Crew Fishing Boat
prompt: A cinematic vertical shot of a small crew fishing from a boat, wearing black wetsuits and orange life jackets loosely hanging around their necks, one man in a black jacket standing prominently; in the background, a colossal megalodon emerges from the ocean, its massive head breaching the surface, jaws wide open revealing terrifying rows of sharp fangs, water cascading off its skin; a tiny figure near the beast for scale; the image mimics a smartphone snapshot posted online, hyper-realistic and intense, captured in the style of an IMAX scene, shot with an ARRIFLEX 35 BL Camera, Canon K35 Prime Lenses, 70mm, dramatic lighting, 6K detail, adrenaline-filled atmosphere --ar 3:2 --v 7.
